chosen_logo.why: Canonical P&G wordmark — SVG version of P_G_Logo_RGB hosted on Contentful CDN, alt='Go to Procter & Gamble homepage', sitting in the <header> of annualreport2025. Vector mark of the iconic blue P&G monogram (cursive 'P&G' in a sphere with surrounding wordmark). Visually matches the circular monogram in every page header in shot.png. Vector form means clean currentColor flipping for white-on-dark covers.

brand_primary.name: P&G Blue
brand_primary.evidence: color_frequency #1 brand-saturated chord — 90 occurrences across 7 of 8 fetched pages; the literal P&G corporate blue (Pantone 286 C territory)

brand_secondary.name: Sky Cyan
brand_secondary.evidence: color_frequency 6 occurrences (annualreport2025, brands); the bright cyan visible in the segmented circle motif on annual report hero

ink.name: Ink
ink.evidence: computed text colour on environmental-sustainability long-form copy; softer than pure black, used on light surfaces

paper.name: Paper Tint
paper.evidence: --hp-header-bg in inline style + color_frequency on innovation/newsroom/who-we-are; near-white with a subtle blue cast — keeps light surfaces in-family with the navy

accents.name: Optimism Yellow
accents.evidence: the yellow dot at end of 'Year.' on home hero; #F6D706 from newsroom page color_frequency — P&G's signature optimism accent

accents.name: Innovation Orange
accents.evidence: innovation page hero accent — Tide-orange tub + headline accent; #E87722 from innovation color_frequency

accents.name: Sustainability Green
accents.evidence: environmental-sustainability page accent (Gillette neon green + sustainability palette); maps to environmental / responsibility content

display_font.evidence: computed_heading on every page = Montserrat ExtraBold/Black; used at giant scale for hero titles (Named #1, Who we are., Innovation, 2025 Annual Report). The geometric optimistic sans is THE P&G display voice.

body_font.evidence: fonts.frequencies #1 = Montserrat (count 67) — same family for body at lighter weights (400/500). Times shows up only as a rare fallback (count 7); not the design choice.

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: header rounded pill buttons (Search here, USA selector); CTAs have ~24px-radius pill but content cards keep 4-8px corners on annualreport2025; flat surfaces with crisp colour blocking — no SaaS soft-shadow layering anywhere

precedents: Pampers/Tide consumer-product marketing — bright but disciplined
